subcodes.first_line: O Speaker with God! Thou didst flee from the Pharaohs of the people after thou hadst laid hold upon the cord of God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کلیم ا فررت من فراعنه القوم بعد الذی تمسکت بعروه الله العزیز العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God
